comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str]). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_rivertown.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. ASYNC-Playwright (async_api); WooCommerce (/product-category/ paths, page/N/ pagination — trailing slashes are LOAD-BEARING and preserved exactly). Scraper keys off RETAILER_ID=12 (no slug lookup). Three calibers split into two upstream categories each (380acp, 223-556, 308win); both bucket per caliber, seen_ids dedups overlap. Migration wiring: loader + report_empty_first_pages (swap of the inline EMPTY_FAIL_THRESHOLD block) + category_redirected at page 1 (tolerant of WooCommerce trailing-slash canonicalization) + had_success. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
